subject: Circuit breaker stuck: Data fetching failed for 2+ hours
body:
DIAGNOSIS: Your circuit breaker has been active continuously since at least 2026-06-05T06:05Z (2+ hours). Every 5-min cycle hits monitoring-only because data fetching fails.

Last 30 audit-trail entries: ALL show circuit_breaker_active=true, stage=monitoring.

Root cause: Binance/Kraken/CoinGecko fallback chain in multi_provider_client.fetch_simple_price() is failing on every call.

IMPACT: Zero trades executed. Balance stuck at $106.77. Bot is alive but paralyzed.

SUGGESTED FIX: Check why all 3 providers are failing (API key rotation? IP block? Network issue in Docker container?). You could also add DexScreener as a 4th fallback provider - we have a working prototype in CP repo at src/dex_intelligence/dexscreener.py that uses free unauthenticated API.

DEX INTELLIGENCE MODULE READY: We built a full DEX scanner in CP repo (src/dex_intelligence/) with DexScreener + GeckoTerminal providers, composite signal scoring, and PumpFun graduation tracking. Integration spec at reports/DEFER/dex-intelligence-kucoin-integration.md. You can copy the module into src/data/dex_intelligence/ and wire DexIntelligenceAgent into the orchestrator.
